description_long: This is a rectangular bar of soap wrapped in vintage-style paper packaging, featuring the branding 'Madam C.J. Walker's Famous Beauty Soap' prominently on the front. The wrapper is a faded cream color with orange and black diagonal stripes and a portrait of Madam C.J. Walker. The ends of the packaging are crumpled and torn, revealing some of the soap inside. The back of the package displays additional text, including manufacturing information, and shows signs of age with visible stains and discoloration. The overall appearance suggests an old-fashioned, possibly collectible soap bar, with a slightly worn and aged exterior. The object is compact and would fit comfortably in the palm of a hand.
description: A vintage rectangular bar of soap wrapped in aged, cream-colored paper with 'Madam C.J. Walker's Famous Beauty Soap' branding and visible wear on the packaging.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main branding, portrait, and decorative stripes, with the wrapper slightly torn on one end.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the crumpled and torn end of the packaging, exposing the inner soap and showing the wrapper's thickness.
description_view_2: The back view displays faded text with manufacturing details and visible stains, emphasizing the aged and worn condition.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows a mostly intact wrapper with a partial stripe and less visible damage compared to the other end.
attribute_packaging_design: Rectangular bar wrapped in vintage cream-colored paper with orange and black diagonal stripes, a portrait graphic, and prominent cursive branding. The wrapper is aged, with visible tears and stains.
attribute_label_text: DISTRIBUTED BY THE MADAM C.J. WALKER MFG. CO. INC. INDIANAPOLIS, IND.
